Name: DEAD_TYPE_PARAM
Description: Controls timing, effects, sound, and gameplay state transitions that occur when a character dies, including item drops, soul release, and visual/audio fade-out behavior.

Fields.Name: Character Model Deletion Time [sec]
Fields.Description: Time in seconds before the dead character model is removed from the scene.

Fields.Name: Lock-On Release Time [sec]
Fields.Description: Time after death when lock-on targeting is disabled.

Fields.Name: Item Drop Time [sec]
Fields.Description: Time after death when item drops are triggered.

Fields.Name: Hit Collision Disable Time [sec]
Fields.Description: Time after death when hit detection is disabled.

Fields.Name: Soul Drop Start Time [sec]
Fields.Description: Time after death when soul drop is triggered.

Fields.Name: Death SFX Start Time [sec]
Fields.Description: Time after death when death-related special effects begin.

Fields.Name: Death SFX Type
Fields.Description: Defines the type of visual effect played on death.

Fields.Name: Fade Duration [sec]
Fields.Description: Duration of the fade-out effect after death.

Fields.Name: Death Sound ID
Fields.Description: Identifier for the sound effect played on death.

Fields.Name: Death Culling Filter ID
Fields.Description: Controls visibility culling behavior after death.

Fields.Name: Disabled Body Parts on Death
Fields.Description: Specifies which character parts are disabled or hidden after death.

Fields.Name: Ragdoll Disassembly Flag
Fields.Description: Determines whether the character breaks apart physically on death.

Fields.Name: Death Soul Bullet ID
Fields.Description: Identifier for the projectile or effect used when releasing souls on death.
